LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SKYLINE COMMERCIAL INTERIORS, INC. DBA SKYLINE CONSTRUCTION'SMOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER DEFENDANT SUPPLIED DEFECTIVE SCAFFOLDING TO PLAINTIFF THAT AFFIRMATIVELY CONTRIBUTED TO HIS INJURY. [SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING] COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RCE)

DEFENDANT SKYLINE COMMERCIAL INTERIORS, INC. DBA SKYLINE CONSTRUCTION'SMOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Defendant's motion for summary judgment and summary adjudication on cause of action one [negligence] is denied. There is a triable issue of fact whether defendant supplied defective scaffolding to plaintiff that affirmatively contributed to his injury.
